query: INSERT INTO site_settings (settingKey, settingValue) VALUES ('aboutContent', 'James C. Bell is a pastor, author, and ministry leader whose work spans local church leadership, global pastoral training, and public theological writing. He serves as Lead Pastor of First Baptist Church of Fenton in Fenton, Michigan, where he has shepherded the congregation since 2016. He is the husband of Susanna and the father of five sons. James is the founder of the Pastors Connection Network (PCN), a national and international ministry dedicated to connecting, mentoring, and equipping pastors and churches for sustainable, faithful ministry. James is the founder of LiveWell, a writing and ministry platform committed to biblical depth, cultural clarity, and prophetic honesty. At his core, James Bell is a pastor.') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE settingValue = VALUES(settingValue)
